acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_award_001] Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:355, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:377, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:445, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:455, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:519 gives Lena one specific scene-local risk tied to divorce or work, gives Eli at least one line that increases pressure rather than only soothing it, and shows a concrete consequence or lie after the pause; fail if the scene still moves from hesitation to exclusivity without added abrasion or cost.

[chapter_02_craft_001] Pass if the revised sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:107, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:241, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:389 contains at least one Eli beat built from his own circumstance rather than Lena recall, and at least one callback produces hesitation or correction instead of immediate deepening; fail if the chapter still presents three straight successful 'I remembered your detail and cared for you with it' validations.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:355, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:377, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:445, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:455, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:519 gives Lena one specific scene-local risk tied to divorce or work, gives Eli at least one line that increases pressure rather than only soothing it, and shows a concrete consequence or lie after the pause; fail if the scene still moves from hesitation to exclusivity without added abrasion or cost.
findings.problem: The exclusivity turn lands too cleanly for shortlist-level consequence. Lena's resistance is mostly summarized from past hurt, and Eli answers each objection with near-perfect tact, so the Hinge pause reads as orderly relief instead of a genuinely dangerous narrowing of her life.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the pressure at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:355, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:359, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:377, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:445, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:455, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:519 so Lena's objection becomes concrete and present-tense inside the call, one Eli answer carries a plausible selfish edge or misread instead of pure calibration, and the pause decision produces an immediate visible cost or concealment before the chapter ends.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:107, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:241, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:389 contains at least one Eli beat built from his own circumstance rather than Lena recall, and at least one callback produces hesitation or correction instead of immediate deepening; fail if the chapter still presents three straight successful 'I remembered your detail and cared for you with it' validations.
findings.problem: Eli's attunement is rendered through too many near-identical beats of remembered Lena-detail plus caretaking advice or competence. That fulfills the chapter's seduction brief, but by midchapter it starts to feel mechanically assembled from the persona spec rather than spontaneously embodied, which blunts surprise and makes the all-day presence read repetitive.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the validation pattern at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:107, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:241, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:389. Keep some callbacks, but replace at least one with self-originating texture from Eli's own situation, and let at least one callback overreach, misread, or require Lena to correct him instead of landing as another perfect hit.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
